title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: In the icy weather of Patagonia, the survival expert reveals the hidden dangers that make survival so difficult and demonstrates how to build a snow cave.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Mountaineers survive in the Alps in potentially fatal conditions.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: In the vastness of the Sahara desert and the terrifying beauty of towering sand dunes, Bear Grylls tackles extreme survival challenges as he consumes one of the world's deadliest scorpions to survive.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: In the vastness of the Sahara desert and the terrifying beauty of towering sand dunes, Bear Grylls tackles extreme survival challenges as he consumes one of the world's deadliest scorpions to survive.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear Grylls shows how to make a snow cave, find water in deep tunnels and avoid frostbite in order to survive Iceland's extreme conditions.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear chops his way into petrified swamps devastated by the 2004 tsunami and must navigate his way out, facing deadly lizards, snakes, waterfalls and steep cliffs.

title: Forbidden: Dying for Love
subTitle: A married man embarks on a forbidden relationship with his 14-year-old babysitter. When his wife finds out, he will stop at nothing to keep his affair secret from the police.

title: Money Mafia
subTitle: Explore how Abdul Karim Telgi turned India upside down with a stamp paper scam that amassed him a huge fortune, including 36 properties and over 120 bank accounts in several cities.

title: Escape Room: Tournament of Champions
subTitle: Ben and Zoey find themselves trapped in a series of deadly escape rooms with four others. They try to survive and find a way out as they slowly discover that they have played the game before.

title: Bad Boys for Life
subTitle: Ageing bad boys Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett manoeuvre midlife crises, high-speed chases, and explosive collisions with an enemy who can set the world on fire to avenge Benito.

title: Bad Boys
subTitle: Marcus, a family man and Mike, a ladies' man, are partners in the Miami police department. Later, things get complicated when they assume each other's identity while investigating a drug deal.

title: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
subTitle: A group of people tries to survive while a dying city gets overrun by zombies.

title: Malignant
subTitle: Madison, a young woman, is terrified by visions of the murders of strangers. Later, she decides to find and save the victims.

title: Charlie's Angels
subTitle: Charlie, a wealthy mystery figure, tasks three capable and captivating women with the job of finding Eric Knox, a genius in software development and the leader of Knox Enterprises.

title: A Nightmare on Elm Street
subTitle: After Kris and her boyfriend Dean die due to a mysterious dream, Nancy, their friend, who has been having similar dreams realises that the killer finds his victims when they fall asleep.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear travels to America's greatest mountain range-the Sierra Nevada. He uses his knowledge of American Indian survival techniques to build shelters, calm wild horses, and find food.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: In Patagonia, Bear skins a hare, scales a cliff, tracks a puma, drinks dirty water and crosses the Perito Moreno Glacier, a labyrinth of ice caves and crevasses.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear Grylls draws upon all his experience as a survivor to tackle the dangers of the Costa Rican rainforest, climbing 100 ft trees and down 120 ft waterfalls, facing snakes and sweltering humidity.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear will have to skin and disembowel a camel in an attempt to stay alive as he wonders if he will learn to deal with the hardships and the disgusting taste of the camel.

subTitle: Mountaineers survive in the Alps in potentially fatal conditions.

subTitle: In the vastness of the Sahara desert and the terrifying beauty of towering sand dunes, Bear Grylls tackles extreme survival challenges as he consumes one of the world's deadliest scorpions to survive.

subTitle: It is love at first sight for Michelle and Dennis. But soon, the dark past of Michelle's new husband rears its ugly head and ends in a double homicide.

subTitle: Captain Billy Tyne and his crew embark on a fishing expedition aboard the Andrea Gail. However, their ship soon gets caught in an unusually destructive storm.

subTitle: Two associates of an elite commando team fight an army of zombies controlled by an evil desktop computer in a genetic research facility.

title: Food Factory
subTitle: The manufacturing of red licorice candy, spicy sriracha mayonnaise, flaky Turkish bourekas and a cookie that combines dark chocolate with two wafer-thin cookies are explored.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear Grylls has served with the British Special forces, climbed to the peak of Everest and explored the frozen ocean of the Arctic. Now he faces the punishing heat of the Moab desert in Utah.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: In the lethal mangroves and infamous viper pits of Panama, Bear Grylls tackles some extreme survival challenges and some grisly eats to show how to get out alive.

subTitle: A high-flying attorney and one of his clients embark on an illicit affair. When their secret is revealed, the laws of attraction prove fatal.

subTitle: Alice wakes up to find that Raccoon city is infested with zombies and monsters. Later, she tries her best to find a way out of the city before it is too late.
